title: Samuel Von’s Resume
text:
City: Rosenberg, TX | Phone: 1(817) 538-6243 | Email: sam.von@outlook.com


Brigham Young University Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho
Bachelor of Science, Major in Geology, Certificate in GIS, GPA: 3.98
Expected graduation: Spring 2026



Teaching Assistant, BYUI — Rexburg, ID
Jan 2024 – Present
- Helped students with geology concepts such as Sedimentology and Stratigraphy
- Maintained documentation of student grades
- Assisted with field trips
Tutor, BYUI — Rexburg, ID
Jan 2025 – Dec 2025
- Created learning plans for students
- Taught kinematics, physical geology, energy, circular motion




Historical Geology

Structure

Sedimentology and Stratigraphy

Igneous and Metamorphic Petrology

Geochemistry

GIS for STEM

Environmental Geology

Remote Sensing




Logistics Helper, Geology Society — Rexburg, ID
Sep 2024 – Present
- Organized events, recruited new members, assisted in planning 7 events
Student Research, Rexburg, ID
Jan 2025 – Apr 2025
- Participated in research on Thin Films
- Gained experience with XRD machine and vacuum chamber




Cross-section of Canadian Fold and Thrust System

Mapping Stratigraphy of Richardson Amphitheater, UT

Statistical analysis of hazardous uranium mines in Navajo Nation using ArcGIS
